name: Riku Azami
description: Riku Azami lived with an abusive father and a drug addicted mother. He was taken to the orphanage when his father committed suicide. He soon sought after boxing to learn how to protect the ones he loves.

description: Third son of the Yamada household and the youngest in Buster Bros!!!. A genius-type who can do just about anything. Unlike his brothers, not a delinquent.

name: Shiori Misaka
description: __Height:__ 157cm Shiori is a first-year student at the same school Yuuichi attends. ~!She has suffered from an illness since birth and her affliction has caused her to become very physically weak. Usually Shiori is absent from school because of that. Still, she stands almost everyday outside in the snow of the school grounds, wanting to meet someone dear to her.!~ She also likes ice-cream.

In addition, however, she is also a Red Kämpfer fighting with the Schwert ability of wielding two chained daggers at will. She wants to expose Moderator's intentions but has no problem fighting Blue Kämpfers until that goal was accomplished. description: Bocchi's classmate who comes from another country and considers herself to be a ninja. Her name is derived from soto kara kita (外から来た, "came from outside"). (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Audrey Hall
description: Audrey is an extremely beautiful young lady with emerald green eyes and smooth blonde hair. She is known as the most dazzling gem in Backlund. One of the first members of the Tarot Club.

description: Ayano Toki is [Nadeshiko's](https://anilist.co/character/124576/Nadeshiko-Kagamihara) childhood friend.

name: Ayase Ayatsuji
description: Ayase Ayatsuji is a third year student from Hagun Academy. She is a D-Rank Blazer who uses the katana-style Device Hizume.

description: __Height:__ 193 cm Chiaki Hanazono is Kuzu High's point guard. He is very talented in his view of field and often executes difficult and tricky passes that lead to scoring. He is Momoharu Hanazono's twin brother.

name: Inca Kasugatani
description: __Height:__ 160 cm (5'3'') Inca Kasugatani is a citizen of Tokyo, whose famously reputed as a fire thief across the country for her acts of saving people from fires in exchange for their valuables. (Source: Fire Force Wiki)

name: Joichiro Nishi
description: Joichiro Nishi is a middle-school veteran of the Gantz world, having arrived there over a year before the beginning of the series. While running away from police officers after shoplifting, he fled onto an apartment building roof where he fell to his death. Much like how Kurono started out, he is also selfish and has a Social Darwinist approach to life.
